name: Valleyview Resources Ltd.
description: Valleyview Resources Ltd., now operating as Homeland Uranium Corporation (TSXV: HLU), is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the United States uranium sector. The company specializes in the identification and acquisition of strategic mineral properties, particularly those with historical uranium and vanadium resources in Colorado. Its primary mission is to contribute to the domestic US uranium supply by advancing projects like the Coyote Basin and Cross Bones through brownfields exploration and strategic acquisitions, aiming to become a premier resource-bearing developer in the American energy market.
